zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Vernon II於大約1286年出生在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，他的父親Richard de Vernon33歲，母親Juliana de Vesci37歲。他和Matilda De Camville Baroness Vernon至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1323年2月3日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾哈盧亞斯頓享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Vernon II was born about 1286, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, his father, Richard de Vernon, was 33 and his mother, Juliana de Vesci, was 37. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Matilda De Camville Baroness Vernon. He died on 3 February 1323, in Harlaston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Vernon II est né environ 1286, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Vernon, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Vesci, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Matilda De Camville Baroness Vernon. Il est décédé le 3 février 1323, à Harlaston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon II(이)가 대략 1286년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Vernon(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Vesci(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Matilda De Camville Baroness Vernon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1323년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 하를라스턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Vernon II родился около 1286 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Vernon было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Vesci, 37. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Matilda De Camville Baroness Vernon. Он умер 3 февраля 1323 г. в местности харластон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
